response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal direct C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments and a bachelor’s thesis, with no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven and distributed systems using Node.js and DLang
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to work across diverse stacks and deliver production-grade systems
concerns: Lacks demonstrable recent or deep C++/STL development experience required for the role
No evidence of experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA)
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with no Azure or cloud-native automation exposure
